paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.68 as of July 22, 2026, with a change of 0.45% from the prior close and a change of -25.53% over the last 22 sessions.

Recent news includes the announcement of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, with the call scheduled for August 13, 2026. Other news headlines discuss the company's convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and another filing related to the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
